betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Advanced Inventories: Modular Storage§f

§aConsolidate thousands of items into a single, compact block with smart filters and search functionality!§f

Traditional chests take up massive space and cannot be searched efficiently. RFTools §bModular Storage§f blocks solve this by storing massive quantities of items digitally on modular cards.

§6Storage Cards & Capacities§f:
A Modular Storage block does not store items on its own. You must insert a §bStorage Card§f to define its capacity:
§b• Storage Card Tier 1§f: Stores up to §e100 item stacks§f.
§b• Storage Card Tier 2§f: Stores up to §e200 item stacks§f.
§b• Storage Card Tier 3§f: Stores up to §e300 item stacks§f.

§6GUI Features & Filtering§f:
§9Right-click§f the Modular Storage block to open its interface. It features:
§b• Search Bar§f: Type item names to instantly highlight matching slots.
§b• Focus Search§f: The interface automatically focuses on the search bar when opened.
§b• Sorting Modes§f: Sort items alphabetically, by stack size, or by item ID.
§b• Built-in Crafting Grid§f: Craft items directly from the stored inventory without closing the screen.
§b• Storage Filter§f: Insert a §bStorage Filter§f to restrict what items can be imported (e.g., whitelist ores, blacklist junk blocks).

§eTip§f: Use a §bStorage Filter§f early — it lets you safely pipe items into the block without risking junk clogging your carefully sorted inventory.
